domain: Mudskipper dual-mode respiration (gill in water; cutaneous + buccal air-pocket on land; valve in gill chamber reconfigures the SAME organ; mode switch triggered by aerial hypoxia)
specific_mechanism: Single shared organ runs in two distinct modes via a binary valve; trigger comes from a specific hypoxia signal in the air channel.
llm_application: MUDLLM: single shared KV cache + attention region runs in two modes (small cheap + large expensive) via a binary valve gate; valve is triggered ONLY by an explicit hypoxia signal (output-uncertainty + latency budget) — not by a default routing policy. The same parameters/cache are read with different access patterns per mode.
novelty_claim: Edge-Cloud collab (2507.16731), HybridGen (2604.18529), Adaptive Edge-Cloud (2512.12769) all use SEPARATE resources orchestrated with load balancer. MUDLLM uses one shared resource with a binary valve triggered by uncertainty hypoxia — not yet a published primitive.
